sourceAmbiguity: The blueprint distinguishes same request, same episode, and separate request handling but does not define the split boundary for phone follow-ups.
decisionTaken: Same-request attach requires accepted continuity witness and no divergence. Same-episode link may occur without request attachment only under explicit same_episode_link policy. Missing or drifted witness becomes review or separate-request posture.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: It preserves episode awareness without mutating a submitted request from ambiguous evidence.
operationalRisk: Some legitimate same-request updates will be held until human review when the witness is incomplete.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Adjust duplicate cases and validator before changing same_episode_candidate behavior.
